items.definition_en: A smile is an expression on your face when you are happy or friendly.
items.example_en: Her smile made everyone feel welcome.

items.definition_en: A frown is a serious or angry look on your face.
items.example_en: He had a deep frown during the meeting.

items.definition_en: A nod is the act of moving your head up and down to say yes.
items.example_en: She gave a quick nod to show agreement.

items.definition_en: A wink is closing one eye quickly as a signal.
items.example_en: He gave her a wink before leaving.

items.definition_en: A wave is moving your hand to say hello or goodbye.
items.example_en: She gave her friend a cheerful wave.

items.definition_en: A shrug is raising your shoulders to show you do not know something.
items.example_en: His only answer was a shrug.

items.definition_en: A glance is a quick look at someone or something.
items.example_en: He gave his watch a quick glance.

items.definition_en: A stare is a long and direct look at someone or something.
items.example_en: Her stare made him feel uncomfortable.

items.definition_en: A hug is putting your arms around someone to show care.
items.example_en: She gave him a big hug.

items.definition_en: A handshake is holding someone's hand to greet or agree.
items.example_en: They ended the meeting with a firm handshake.

items.definition_en: A pat is a gentle touch with your hand to show support.
items.example_en: She gave the child a pat on the back.

items.definition_en: A thumbs-up is lifting your thumb to show something is good.
items.example_en: He gave me a thumbs-up before the race.

items.definition_en: A bow is bending your body forward to show respect.
items.example_en: She made a small bow before leaving.

items.definition_en: A grimace is a look on your face that shows pain or dislike.
items.example_en: He made a grimace after tasting the lemon.

items.definition_en: A gesture is a movement of your hand or body to show meaning.
items.example_en: She used a gesture to ask for help.

items.definition_en: A nod of approval is moving your head to show you agree.
items.example_en: Her boss gave her a nod of approval.

items.definition_en: A shoulder tap is touching someone on the shoulder to get attention.
items.example_en: A gentle shoulder tap made him turn around.

items.definition_en: A gaze is when you look at someone or something for a long time.
items.example_en: Her gaze was fixed on the painting.

items.definition_en: A sigh is when you breathe out loudly to show sadness or relief.
items.example_en: He let out a sigh after the long day.

items.definition_en: A poke is a quick push with your finger or hand.
items.example_en: She gave him a poke to wake him up.
